title: The Spiritual Meaning of Talking house in Dreams

cosmicAnalysis: Dreams of Talking house are deeply connected to the lunar cycle. During the **Waxing Moon**, this symbol suggests growth and the accumulation of talking house-energy in your waking life. A **Full Moon** dream of Talking house signifies a moment of peak clarity—the unconscious is fully illuminated.
